Home | Blog

Introducing Llama 4: Multimodal Intelligence

April 5, 2025

Today, Meta is releasing Llama 4 Scout and Llama 4 Maverick, our first natively multimodal Llama models. These models support text and image input with a 10M token context window.

Model Overview

Llama 4 Scout is a 17B active parameter model using a mixture-of-experts architecture with 16 experts. Llama 4 Maverick is a 17B active parameter model with 128 experts and is designed for more complex tasks.

Models are available as llama-4-scout and llama-4-maverick on the Meta Llama API and HuggingFace.

Benchmarks

Llama 4 Scout achieves 80.5% on MMLU and 88.7% on HumanEval as reported by Meta. These are vendor-provided results pending independent verification.

Weights and Licensing

Open model weights are available at Llama 4 Scout on HuggingFace under the Llama 4 Community License.

Safety

A system prompt card is linked for each model. See the Llama 4 Safety Report for details on safety evaluation and red-teaming.

Technical Details

For full architecture and training details, see the Llama 4 Technical Report.
